items.excerpt: AMD released FSR SDK 2.3, extending its FSR 4.1 neural upscaling and AI Ray Regeneration denoiser to previous-generation RDNA 3 GPUs (Radeon RX 7000 Series), arriving ahead of the planned July timeline. Brings AI-accelerated real-time rendering to more artist workstations.

Adobe shipped Substance 3D Sampler 6.0 for material authoring, adding OpenPBR support and dynamic, AI-assisted versions of its Auto Tiling and Content-Aware Fill image-to-material filters that speed up turning photos into tileable PBR textures.
